en: more lately, i.e. eventually
lofty (in place or character)
highest, i.e. (masculine singular) the Supreme (God), or (neuter plural) the heavens
to eat (literally or figuratively)
to lighten (shine), i.e. show (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative)
kjv: appear, seem, be seen, shine, X think

en: shining, i.e. apparent (literally or figuratively); neuter (as adverb) publicly, externally
kjv: abroad, + appear, known, manifest, open (+ -ly), outward (+ -ly)

en: to render apparent (literally or figuratively)
plainly, i.e. clearly or publicly
(properly concrete) a (mere) show ("phantasm"), i.e. spectre
a separatist, i.e. exclusively religious; a Pharisean, i.e. Jewish sectary
brilliancy
to "bear" or carry (in a very wide application, literally and figuratively, as follows)
kjv: be, bear, bring (forth), carry, come, + let her drive, be driven, endure, go on, lay, lead, move, reach, rushing, uphold

en: to run away (literally or figuratively); by implication, to shun; by analogy, to vanish
to show or make known one's thoughts, i.e. speak or say
ill-will (as detraction), i.e. jealousy (spite)

to be a friend to (fond of (an individual or an object)), i.e. have affection for (denoting personal attachment, as a matter of sentiment or feeling; while G25 (ἀγαπάω) is wider, embracing especially the judgment and the deliberate assent of the will as a matter of principle, duty and propriety: the two thus stand related very much as G2309 (θέλω) and G1014 (βούλομαι), or as G2372 (θυμός) and G3563 (νοῦς) respectively; the former being chiefly of the heart and the latter of the head); specially, to kiss (as a mark of tenderness)
fond of horses; Philippus, the name of four Israelites
to muzzle
to frighten, i.e. (passively) to be alarmed; by analogy, to be in awe of, i.e. revere
alarm or fright
to be a murderer (of)
murder
to whip, i.e. lash as a public punishment
a fence, or inclosing barrier (literally or figuratively)

to exercise the mind, i.e. entertain or have a sentiment or opinion; by implication, to be (mentally) disposed (more or less earnestly in a certain direction); intensively, to interest oneself in (with concern or obedience)
kjv: set the affection on, (be) care(-ful), (be like-, + be of one, + be of the same, + let this) mind(-ed), regard, savour, think

en: a guarding or (concretely, guard), the act, the person; figuratively, the place, the condition, or (specially), the time (as a division of day or night), literally or figuratively
to watch, i.e. be on guard (literally of figuratively); by implication, to preserve, obey, avoid
a sprout, i.e. leaf
to set out in the earth, i.e. implant; figuratively, to instil doctrine
to emit a sound (animal, human or instrumental); by implication, to address in words or by name, also in imitation
a tone (articulate, bestial or artificial); by implication, an address (for any purpose), saying or language
compare G5316 (φαίνω), G5346 (φημί)); luminousness (in the widest application, natural or artificial, abstract or concrete, literal or figurative)
to be "cheer"ful, i.e. calmly happy or well-off; impersonally, especially as salutation (on meeting or parting), be well
kjv: farewell, be glad, God speed, greeting, hall, joy(- fully), rejoice

en: to lower (as into a void)
a copper dish
copper (the substance, or some implement or coin made of it)
cheerfulness, i.e. calm delight
kjv: gladness, X greatly, (X be exceeding) joy(-ful, -fully, -fulness, -ous)

en: a lip (as a pouring place); figuratively, a margin (of water)
akin to the base of 5490 through the idea of a channel), meaning a storm (as pouring rain); by implication, the rainy season, i.e. winter
the hand (literally or figuratively (power); especially (by Hebraism) a means or instrument)
manufactured, i.e. of human construction
from an obsolete equivalent (of uncertain derivation); more evil or aggravated (physically, mentally or morally)
a widow (as lacking a husband), literally or figuratively
the commander of a thousand soldiers ("chiliarch"; i.e. colonel
a tunic or shirt
greenish, i.e. verdant, dun-colored
a hog
a heap (as poured out), i.e. rubbish; loose dirt
to fodder, i.e. (generally) to gorge (supply food in abundance)
a "court" or "garden", i.e. (by implication, of pasture) herbage or vegetation
employment, i.e. an affair; also (by implication) occasion, demand, requirement or destitution
kjv: business, lack, necessary(-ity), need(-ful), use, want

en: something useful or needed, i.e. wealth, price
anointed, i.e. the Messiah, an epithet of Jesus

a space of time (in general, and thus properly distinguished from G2540 (καιρός), which designates a fixed or special occasion; and from G165 (αἰών), which denotes a particular period) or interval; by extension, an individual opportunity; by implication, delay
kjv: + years old, season, space, (X often-)time(-s), (a) while

en: "halt", i.e. limping
room, i.e. a space of territory (more or less extensive; often including its inhabitants)
kjv: coast, county, fields, ground, land, region

en: to be in (give) space, i.e. (intransitively) to pass, enter, or (transitively) to hold, admit (literally or figuratively)
kjv: come, contain, go, have place, (can, be room to) receive

en: to place room between, i.e. part; reflexively, to go away
a spot or plot of ground
kjv: field, land, parcel of ground, place, possession

en: at a space, i.e. separately or apart from (often as preposition)
to be an untrue testifier, i.e. offer falsehood in evidence
a spurious prophet, i.e. pretended foreteller or religious impostor
a spurious Messiah
a little bit or morsel

breath, i.e. (by implication) spirit, abstractly or concretely (the animal sentient principle only; thus distinguished on the one hand from G4151 (πνεῦμα), which is the rational and immortal soul; and on the other from G2222 (ζωή), which is mere vitality, even of plants: these terms thus exactly correspond respectively to the Hebrew H05315, H07307 and H02416)
kjv: heart (+ -ily), life, mind, soul, + us, + you

en: as a sign of the vocative case, O; as a note of exclamation, oh
in this same spot, i.e. here or hither
a pang or throe, especially of childbirth
an "hour" (literally or figuratively)
kjv: day, hour, instant, season, X short, (even-)tide, (high) time

en: which how, i.e. in that manner (very variously used, as follows)
kjv: about, after (that), (according) as (it had been, it were), as soon (as), even as (like), for, how (greatly), like (as, unto), since, so (that), that, to wit, unto, when(-soever), while, X with all speed

en: oh save!; hosanna (i.e. hoshia-na), an exclamation of adoration
as thus, i.e. in the same way
kjv: even so, likewise, after the same (in like) manner

en: as if
kjv: about, as (it had been, it were), like (as)

en: so too, i.e. thus therefore (in various relations of consecution, as follow)
kjv: (insomuch) as, so that (then), (insomuch) that, therefore, to, wherefore
